removed_ui_issues: Removed truncated labels such as Overview, Development, Temporal, and System in the narrow right rail
Moved section navigation to a scalable single selector
preserved_behaviors: Parcel search and detail drawer behavior
Development Hotspots controls in the Layer Registry
accessibility: Native select preserves keyboard and screen-reader support
Selector has a visible label and description
Current section is displayed clearly with a section icon and full label

validation.browser_smoke_test: not run; no browser automation tool was available in this session

future_scalability_benefits: New intelligence modules can be added as select options without compressing labels
Section descriptions can clarify module scope without adding horizontal clutter
The right rail stays usable at narrow widths
